    <style>
        * { box-sizing: border-box; font-family: 'Tajawal', sans-serif; touch-action: manipulation; }
        body { 
            background: #0a0e17; color: white; margin: 0; padding: 15px; 
            display: flex; flex-direction: column; min-height: 100vh;
            background-image: radial-gradient(circle at top, #002b5c 0%, #0a0e17 70%);
            padding-bottom: 80px;
        }

        /* === شاشة الدخول === */
        #loginScreen {
            position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;
            background: #0a0e17; z-index: 3000;
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            background-image: radial-gradient(circle at top, #002b5c 0%, #0a0e17 70%);
        }
        .login-card {
            background: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.6); padding: 40px; border-radius: 25px;
            text-align: center; width: 90%; max-width: 400px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
        }
        .room-input {
            width: 100%; padding: 15px; margin: 20px 0; border-radius: 12px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); background: rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
            color: white; text-align: center; font-size: 1.2rem; outline: none;
            font-family: 'Tajawal';
        }
        .room-input:focus { border-color: #00c6ff; }
        .join-btn {
            width: 100%; padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; border: none;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #00c6ff, #0072ff);
            color: white; font-weight: bold; font-size: 1.1rem; cursor: pointer;
            transition: 0.3s;
        }
        .join-btn:hover { box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(0, 198, 255, 0.4); }

        /* === الهيدر === */
        .compact-header {
            display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
            background: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.9); padding: 10px 15px; border-radius: 50px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); margin-bottom: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
        }
        .live-badge { 
            color: #ff4b4b; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 1px; 
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 1rem;
        }
        .live-badge i { font-size: 0.7rem; animation: pulse 2s infinite; }
        @keyframes pulse { 0% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.5; } 100% { opacity: 1; } }

        .btn-info { 
            width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; border: none; color: #fff; 
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer;
            background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
            font-size: 1rem;
        }

        /* === الشبكة === */
        .grid-container { 
            display: grid; gap: 10px; padding: 15px; 
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03); border-radius: 20px; 
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); 
            margin: 0 auto; width: 100%; max-width: 600px;
        }
        .cols-3 { grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); }
        .cols-4 { grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); }
        .cols-5 { grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr); }

        .cell-card { 
            aspect-ratio: 1/1; 
            background: linear-gradient(145deg, #2c3e50, #1a252f); 
            border-radius: 15px; 
            display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; 
            font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 900; 
            border: 2px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); 
            position: relative; overflow: hidden; transition: 0.2s;
            box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        .cell-number { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3); z-index: 1; font-size: 1.2rem; }
        
        .cell-card.revealed { background: #000; border-color: #444; }
        .cell-card.revealed .cell-number { opacity: 0; }
        
        .cell-image { 
            width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; position: absolute; 
            top: 0; left: 0; display: none; z-index: 2; border-radius: 13px; 
        }
        .cell-card.revealed .cell-image { display: block; animation: popIn 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275); }
        @keyframes popIn { from { transform: scale(0); opacity: 0; } to { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; } }

        /* === شريط الإحصائيات (مثل الهوست) === */
        .stats-bar {
            margin-top: 20px;
            background: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.6); 
            border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
            padding: 15px; 
            border-radius: 20px;
            display: flex; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 15px;
            width: 100%; max-width: 500px; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;
        }
        .stat-item {
            display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; 
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.2); padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 12px;
            min-width: 70px;
        }
        .stat-count { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 900; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 2px; }
        .stat-label { font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: bold; }

        /* === تخصيص SweetAlert === */
        div:where(.swal2-container) div:where(.swal2-popup) {
            background: #1e2a38 !important;
            border: 2px solid #ffd700 !important;
            color: #fff !important;
            border-radius: 25px !important;
            box-shadow: 0 0 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.8) !important;
        }
        .reveal-modal-content {
            display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255,255,255,0.05) 0%, transparent 70%);
            padding: 20px; border-radius: 20px;
        }
        .reveal-img { 
            width: 140px; height: 140px; object-fit: contain; margin-bottom: 15px; 
            filter: drop-shadow(0 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)); 
            animation: bounceIn 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.68, -0.55, 0.265, 1.55);
        }
        .reveal-title { font-size: 2.2rem; font-weight: 900; margin: 10px 0; text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); }
        .reveal-desc { font-size: 1.2rem; color: #ddd; }
        @keyframes bounceIn { 0% { transform: scale(0); } 80% { transform: scale(1.1); } 100% { transform: scale(1); } }
        
        .swal-transparent-popup { background: transparent !important; border: none !important; box-shadow: none !important; }

        .hidden { display: none !important; }
        #gameContainer { display: none; }
    </style>
</head>
<body>

    <div id="loginScreen">
        <div class="login-card">
            <h2 style="color: #00c6ff; margin-bottom: 10px; font-weight: 900;">مشاهدة الزنزانة</h2>
            <p style="color:#aaa; font-size:0.9rem; margin-bottom:20px;">أدخل كود الغرفة للانضمام</p>
            <input type="text" id="roomInput" class="room-input" placeholder="1234" maxlength="4">
            <button id="joinBtn" class="join-btn">دخول</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div id="gameContainer">
        <div class="compact-header">
            <div class="live-badge"><i class="fa-solid fa-circle"></i> بث مباشر</div>
            <button class="btn-icon btn-info" onclick="showInstructions()"><i class="fa-solid fa-question"></i></button>
        </div>

        <div class="grid-container" id="grid"></div>

        <div class="stats-bar" id="statsBar"></div>
    </div>

    <script type="module">
        import { initializeApp } from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.7.1/firebase-app.js";
        import { getFirestore, doc, onSnapshot, getDoc } from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.7.1/firebase-firestore.js";

        const firebaseConfig = { apiKey: "AIzaSyDmP7LF_Rh_jvJy9vdsWVpHN9mmYzrgbxk", authDomain: "qgames-43e70.firebaseapp.com", projectId: "qgames-43e70", storageBucket: "qgames-43e70.firebasestorage.app", messagingSenderId: "855663167560", appId: "1:855663167560:web:c710e774d09ba7c7a4707d" };
        const app = initializeApp(firebaseConfig);
        const db = getFirestore(app);

        const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
        const urlCode = urlParams.get('room');

        // إذا كان الرابط يحتوي على كود، ادخل مباشرة
        if(urlCode) {
            document.getElementById('roomInput').value = urlCode;
            checkRoom(urlCode);
        }

        document.getElementById('joinBtn').addEventListener('click', () => {
            const code = document.getElementById('roomInput').value.trim();
            if(!code) return Swal.fire({toast:true, title:'أدخل كود الغرفة', icon:'warning', background:'#1e2a38', color:'#fff'});
            checkRoom(code);
        });

        async function checkRoom(roomId) {
            const snap = await getDoc(doc(db, "active_rooms", roomId));
            if(snap.exists()) {
                document.getElementById('loginScreen').style.display = 'none';
                document.getElementById('gameContainer').style.display = 'block';
                listenToGame(roomId);
            } else {
                Swal.fire({title:'الغرفة غير موجودة', text:'تأكد من الكود وحاول مرة أخرى', icon:'error', background:'#1e2a38', color:'#fff'});
            }
        }

        const ITEMS_DATA = {
            'open': { title: 'زنزانة فارغة', desc: '🔓 تم حبس لاعب من الخصم!', img: 'images/open.png', color: '#00c6ff', label: 'زنزانة فارغة' },
            'uniform': { title: 'ملابس السجن', desc: '🚫 ارتدي الملابس!', img: 'images/uniform.png', color: '#e74c3c', label: 'ملابس' },
            'skull': { title: 'إعــــدام', desc: '💀 خروج نهائي!', img: 'images/skull.png', color: '#c0392b', label: 'إعدام' },
            'key': { title: 'مفتـــاح', desc: '🔑 حرر سجين.', img: 'images/key.png', color: '#f1c40f', label: 'مفتاح' },
            'skip': { title: 'زنزانة ممتلئة', desc: '✋ تخطي الدور.', img: 'images/skip.png', color: '#95a5a6', label: 'ممتلئة' }
        };

        function listenToGame(roomId) {
            onSnapshot(doc(db, "active_rooms", roomId), (docSnap) => {
                if(!docSnap.exists()) { 
                    Swal.fire({
                        title: 'انتهت اللعبة', text: 'قام الهوست بإغلاق الغرفة', icon: 'info',
                        confirmButtonText: 'خروج', background: '#1e2a38', color: '#fff'
                    }).then(() => window.location.href = 'index.html');
                    return; 
                }
                
                const data = docSnap.data();
                const gameState = data.gameState;

                renderGrid(gameState.grid, gameState.cols);
                updateStats(gameState.grid);

                // المزامنة مع نافذة الهوست
                if (gameState.modal) {
                    showResultModal(gameState.modal);
                } else {
                    Swal.close(); // يغلق النافذة إذا أغلقها الهوست
                }
            });
        }

        function renderGrid(gridData, cols) {
            const gridContainer = document.getElementById('grid');
            gridContainer.className = `grid-container cols-${cols}`;
            gridContainer.innerHTML = '';

            gridData.forEach((cell, index) => {
                const el = document.createElement('div');
                const isRevealed = cell.status === 'revealed';
                const itemInfo = ITEMS_DATA[cell.type];

                el.className = `cell-card ${isRevealed ? 'revealed' : ''}`;
                el.innerHTML = `
                    <span class="cell-number">${index + 1}</span>
                    <img src="${itemInfo.img}" class="cell-image">
                `;
                gridContainer.appendChild(el);
            });
        }

        function updateStats(gridData) {
            const counts = { 'open': 0, 'uniform': 0, 'skull': 0, 'key': 0, 'skip': 0 };
            gridData.forEach(cell => { if(cell.status === 'hidden') counts[cell.type]++; });

            const statsBar = document.getElementById('statsBar');
            statsBar.innerHTML = '';
            const order = ['skull', 'open', 'uniform', 'key', 'skip'];
            
            order.forEach(type => {
                const info = ITEMS_DATA[type];
                const count = counts[type];
                statsBar.innerHTML += `
                    <div class="stat-item">
                        <div class="stat-count">${count}</div>
                        <div class="stat-label" style="color: ${info.color}">${info.label}</div>
                    </div>
                `;
            });
        }

        function showResultModal(data) {
            // التحقق مما إذا كانت النافذة مفتوحة بالفعل لتجنب الوميض
            if(Swal.isVisible() && Swal.getTitle()?.textContent === data.title) return;

            Swal.fire({
                html: `
                    <div class="reveal-modal-content">
                        <img src="${data.img}" class="reveal-img">
                        <div class="reveal-title" style="color:${data.color}">${data.title}</div>
                        <div class="reveal-desc">${data.desc}</div>
                    </div>
                `,
                showConfirmButton: false, // لا يوجد زر للمشاهد، الهوست يتحكم
                background: '#1e2a38',
                color: '#fff',
                width: 400,
                padding: 0,
                allowOutsideClick: false
            });
        }

        window.showInstructions = () => {
            Swal.fire({
                imageUrl: 'images/instructions.png',
                imageAlt: 'شرح اللعبة',
                showConfirmButton: false,
                showCloseButton: true,
                background: 'transparent',
                backdrop: `rgba(0,0,0,0.9)`,
                customClass: { popup: 'swal-transparent-popup' },
                padding: 0, width: 'auto', imageWidth: 'auto', imageHeight: '80vh'
            });
        };
    </script>

</body></html>
data.title: مشاهدة الزنزانة | KIO
